prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Ford-sourced **AJ-V8 (4.6L Modular V8, engine code 4.6L 4V)** with a **Roush Performance Stage 3 Supercharger Kit (2.3L Eaton TVS blower, 10 psi boost, 500+ hp)** paired with a **Livernois Motorsports custom billet crankshaft (forged 4340 steel, 4.00" stroke)** and **Manley Performance forged H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length, ARP 2000 bolts)** to handle the increased power.

Forced Induction: Install a **Garrett GT35R turbocharger (82mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing)** with a **custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system (Borla Pro XS mufflers, 304-grade mandrel-bent piping)** and a **Tial MV-R 50mm external wastegate (set to 18 psi peak boost)**. Pair with a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU (full CAN bus integration, flex-fuel capable)** and a **Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (for E85 compatibility)**.

Suspension & Handling: Swap the stock front subframe for a **custom-fabricated tubular steel subframe (designed by RML Group, featuring spherical bearing mounts)** and install **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable, 400 lb/in front springs, 600 lb/in rear springs)**. Replace the rear multi-link setup with **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer)** and fit **AP Racing 6-piston front calipers (355mm two-piece rotors, Pagid RS29 pads)** with a **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake line kit**.
estetica: Aero: Install a **custom widebody conversion kit (designed by KW Motorsport, featuring carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a 2.5" extended rear diffuser)** paired with a **Vortex Generators carbon fiber rear wing (3D-printed airfoil, 15° adjustable angle)** and a **Seibon Carbon front splitter (with integrated canards, 3mm thick)**.

Exterior: Replace the stock bumpers with **custom aluminum front/rear bumpers (fabricated by RML Group, featuring integrated tow hooks and a 3D-printed mesh grille)**. Paint the car in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Hyper Blue" (3-stage pearl, matte clear coat)** with **custom vinyl overlays (3M 1080 Gloss Black, "Rally Stripes" pattern, 2" width)**. Fit **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (19x9.5 ET35 front, 19x11 ET25 rear, 5x120 PCD, 20mm spacers)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)**.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with **Sparco Pro ADV racing seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harness slots, 12kg each)** and install a **custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, designed by Safety Devices, with integrated fire suppression system)**. Fit a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (suede, 350mm diameter, quick-release hub)** and a **Motec C127 dash display (with GPS lap timer, boost pressure, and oil temp logging)**. Replace the stock pedals with **aluminum brake/clutch pedals (Tillett Racing, adjustable bias bar)** and add **carbon fiber door cards (with integrated LED shift lights, fabricated by Cobra Seats)**.
